caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and tan suspenders, sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a large, grey, synthetic wig and over-ear headphones. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall covered in small, framed photographs and a shelf containing white boxes and folded clothing, including a garment with the word "LEE" visible. On-screen graphics include a logo featuring a microphone and the text "BOSS TALK 101" and "PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his facial expressions as he looks toward someone off-camera. The scene remains static with only minor movements of the man's mouth and head as he continues his conversation.
